claims.falsification: schemas/lean-toolchain-import-binding-pass-0041.json is missing, has a different schema, status, build_file_count, lean_module_count, SHA-256, or seal
claims.text: Pass 0041 created a LeanToolchainImportBindingSet/v1 artifact with status LEAN_TOOLCHAIN_IMPORT_BINDING_MATCH, build_file_count 6, lean_module_count 16, sha256 ae72dadc5da817622374a9b5654f7389242f3e4f7b218e4c89387d364ef2b0e7, and seal e932959ff41df5260e5af88942184e45c2e9620b878db02b4ccbb609387c78b6.

claims.falsification: the Lean toolchain/import fixture is missing, has a different SHA-256 or seal, or is not linked from the schema
claims.text: Pass 0041 records fixture fixtures/lean-toolchain-import-binding-pass-0041.json with sha256 5d4ff58b42595c47d1d8fccfec4fb6b913186cedc1e2894410a6784b584c5ea9 and seal 98ed8df0f610d30b445ee365c4198b8b3e62fbd43d6514ad3920106ea10b8eb6.

claims.falsification: the pass 0040 binding is missing, has a different SHA-256 or seal, or does not report the expected source status
claims.text: Pass 0041 binds to pass 0040 archived blob statement replay with sha256 e45620662cc30976f8b1f814e5b0ceb3815c16f6e86e091364220fa286bfe654, seal c38574335633bb119b7c14b8f7a69db44751f04f44bb3fd74c71df4e2a74818d, and source status ARCHIVED_BLOB_STATEMENT_REPLAY_MATCH.

claims.falsification: the toolchain summary is missing, has a different Lean toolchain, mathlib input revision, mathlib revision, or Lake manifest package count
claims.text: Pass 0041 binds lean-toolchain leanprover/lean4:v4.31.0, mathlib inputRev v4.31.0, mathlib rev fabf563a7c95a166b8d7b6efca11c8b4dc9d911f, and Lake manifest package count 9.

claims.falsification: the import graph has a different local module count, local import edge count, external import edge count, or lacks the Mathlib external import
claims.text: Pass 0041 records 16 local Lean modules, 41 local import edges, one external import edge, and the external edge targets Mathlib.

claims.falsification: the compiled replay delta is missing, has a count other than six, or fails to mark compiled replay as NOT_RUN
claims.text: Pass 0041 records six local files needed beyond the pass 0040 archive for compiled replay planning, and compiled_replay_status remains NOT_RUN.

claims.falsification: packet 051, the pass 0041 steelman, or the pass 0041 validator result is missing or has a different SHA-256
claims.text: Pass 0041 records packet 051 with sha256 7a139d1eab8c4383765473b2fc23df50165b51e103b9f1a8cdafd813cf19ef79, local steelman with sha256 93d6b2638a709f4833f4ae1d8efb28e875d6fe8a1b1aec5c0d04b50e4af0c425, and validator result sha256 9ac1b3f6708a74850c98e96a18695e08fa2a4138045350ab35b2752834bac2b5.

claims.falsification: pass 0041 artifacts claim Lean replay, semantic proof review, axiom-free proof, validation of every public pipeline-math claim, or a promoted natural law
claims.text: Pass 0041 preserves non-promotion boundaries: it discovers toolchain/import metadata only, does not run Lean, does not claim semantic proof review, and current_promoted_natural_laws remains none.

title: Dogfood Pass 0041 Lean Toolchain Import Binding
